title: taraxacum cucullatum
intro: Taraxacum cucullatum, also known as the western dandelion or mountain dandelion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family Asteraceae. The plant's roots, leaves, and flowers have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum cucullatum include treating digestive issues, reducing blood pressure, and supporting liver function, due to its high content of vitamins A, C, and K, as well as minerals like potassium and iron. Taraxacum cucullatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, or used as a food ingredient, making it a versatile and valuable plant for natural health remedies.
